Um, I know you're all in marketing, so this is not news to you, um, but really just want to start with the importance of Google itself and why, um, we've seen so many customers really focusing on Google and the Google Business profiles.

So Google is telling us that the Google Business profiles will have the largest impact on your local SEO overall, especially for local searches, um, and when prospects are searching for apartments and this AI overview that I'm sure you've all seen comes up, there Google is pulling all of the information for these answers directly from the Google Business profile.

So that's why it's important to have so much content there and so much information about your property, your amenities, what you have available is because that's where Google is pulling information from.
So, um, the things that Google looks for in terms of rewarding based on exposure.

So if you're looking up apartments in Miami, the search results that are that come from that are stacked by Google, and a few of the things that they're looking for is, is the content that you're pushing to your profile relevant?
So is it relevant to your property?
Is it about your property?
And then they also are looking for uniqueness.
So they want the content that's being pushed to your profiles to really be unique.
So not cross posting from social, not posting the same thing over and over.
And then they also look at the frequency piece.
So everything that we have here today that I'll show you is built to fit what Google's looking for.
Um, so it's fit to build, it's built to fit all of these three things.
